languages.text: "Грустишь по своей погибшей сообщнице, слуга Архиврага?" {n}Арджента дерзко и зло усмехается. Но затем тень пробегает по ее лицу, и она бросает быстрый взгляд на вас.{/n} "Вольный Торговец... так ты знал{mf||а}?!"

traits.locale_text: "Грустишь по своей погибшей сообщнице, слуга Архиврага?" {n}Арджента дерзко и зло усмехается. Но затем тень пробегает по ее лицу, и она бросает быстрый взгляд на вас.{/n} "Вольный Торговец... так ты знал{mf||а}?!"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "Miss your fallen accomplice, servant of the Archenemy?" {n}Argenta grins with wicked defiance, but then a shadow passes over her face and she casts you a quick glance.{/n} "Rogue Trader... You knew?"
languages.original_text: "Грустишь по своей погибшей сообщнице, слуга Архиврага?" {n}Арджента дерзко и зло усмехается. Но затем тень пробегает по ее лицу, и она бросает быстрый взгляд на вас.{/n} "Вольный Торговец... так ты знал{mf||а}?!"

traits.locale_text: "Miss your deceased accomplice, servant of the Archenemy?" {n}Argenta grins with wicked defiance, but then a shadow runs across her face and she casts you a quick glance.{/n} "Rogue Trader... So you knew?!"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Miss your deceased accomplice, servant of the Archenemy?" {n}Argenta grins with wicked defiance, but then a shadow runs across her face and she casts you a quick glance.{/n} "Rogue Trader... So you knew?!"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Miss your fallen accomplice, servant of the Archenemy?" {n}Argenta grins with wicked defiance, but then a shadow passes over her face and she casts you a quick glance.{/n} "Rogue Trader... You knew?"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Miss your fallen accomplice, servant of the Archenemy?" {n}Argenta grins with wicked defiance, but then a shadow passes over her face and she casts you a quick glance.{/n} "Rogue Trader... You knew?"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Miss your fallen accomplice, servant of the Archenemy?" {n}Argenta grins with wicked defiance, but then a shadow passes over her face and she casts you a quick glance.{/n} "Rogue Trader... You knew?"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "Vermisst du deine gefallene Komplizin, Dienerin des Erzfeindes?" {n}Argenta grinst mit boshaftem Trotz, doch dann zieht ein Schatten über ihr Gesicht und sie wirft Euch einen kurzen Blick zu.{/n} "Schurkenhändlerin... Ihr wusstet es?"
languages.original_text: "Miss your fallen accomplice, servant of the Archenemy?" {n}Argenta grins with wicked defiance, but then a shadow passes over her face and she casts you a quick glance.{/n} "Rogue Trader... You knew?"

traits.locale_text: "Vermisst du deine gefallene Komplizin, Dienerin des Erzfeindes?" {n}Argenta grinst mit boshaftem Trotz, doch dann zieht ein Schatten über ihr Gesicht und sie wirft Euch einen kurzen Blick zu.{/n} "Schurkenhändlerin... Ihr wusstet es?"

languages.text: "Votre complice déchu, serviteur de l'ennemi juré, vous manque-t-il ? {n}Argenta affiche un sourire de défi, mais une ombre passe sur son visage et elle vous jette un rapide coup d'œil.{/n} "Voleur de commerce... Vous le saviez ?"
languages.original_text: "Miss your fallen accomplice, servant of the Archenemy?" {n}Argenta grins with wicked defiance, but then a shadow passes over her face and she casts you a quick glance.{/n} "Rogue Trader... You knew?"

traits.locale_text: "Votre complice déchu, serviteur de l'ennemi juré, vous manque-t-il ? {n}Argenta affiche un sourire de défi, mais une ombre passe sur son visage et elle vous jette un rapide coup d'œil.{/n} "Voleur de commerce... Vous le saviez ?"

languages.text: "¿Echas de menos a tu cómplice caído, siervo del Archienemigo?". {n}Argenta sonríe con malvado desafío, pero entonces una sombra pasa por su rostro y te lanza una rápida mirada.{/n} "Rogue Trader... ¿Lo sabías?"
languages.original_text: "Miss your fallen accomplice, servant of the Archenemy?" {n}Argenta grins with wicked defiance, but then a shadow passes over her face and she casts you a quick glance.{/n} "Rogue Trader... You knew?"

traits.locale_text: "¿Echas de menos a tu cómplice caído, siervo del Archienemigo?". {n}Argenta sonríe con malvado desafío, pero entonces una sombra pasa por su rostro y te lanza una rápida mirada.{/n} "Rogue Trader... ¿Lo sabías?"

languages.text: "Düşmüş suç ortağını, Baş Düşman'ın hizmetkârını özledin mi?" {n}Argenta hınzır bir meydan okumayla sırıtıyor, ama sonra yüzüne bir gölge düşüyor ve sana hızlı bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Haydut Tüccar... Biliyor muydun?"
languages.original_text: "Miss your fallen accomplice, servant of the Archenemy?" {n}Argenta grins with wicked defiance, but then a shadow passes over her face and she casts you a quick glance.{/n} "Rogue Trader... You knew?"

traits.locale_text: "Düşmüş suç ortağını, Baş Düşman'ın hizmetkârını özledin mi?" {n}Argenta hınzır bir meydan okumayla sırıtıyor, ama sonra yüzüne bir gölge düşüyor ve sana hızlı bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Haydut Tüccar... Biliyor muydun?"
